title: Power BI Dataset
description: Schema for a Power BI dataset resource as returned by the Power BI REST API. A dataset represents the data model that underpins reports and dashboards, including tables, columns, measures, relationships, and data source configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier of the dataset, assigned by the Power BI service

name.description: The display name of the dataset

addRowsAPIEnabled.description: Whether the dataset supports the push rows API for real-time data ingestion

configuredBy.description: The email address of the user who configured or last modified the dataset

isRefreshable.description: Whether the dataset supports scheduled or on-demand refresh

isEffectiveIdentityRequired.description: Whether an effective identity (row-level security identity) is required when generating embed tokens

isEffectiveIdentityRolesRequired.description: Whether RLS role specification is required in effective identity for embed tokens

isOnPremGatewayRequired.description: Whether the dataset requires an on-premises data gateway to connect to its data sources

targetStorageMode.description: The storage mode that determines how data is stored and queried

defaultMode.description: The default mode for push datasets

createdDate.description: The UTC date and time when the dataset was first created

contentProviderType.description: The type of content provider that generated this dataset

createReportEmbedURL.description: The URL to create an embedded report connected to this dataset

qnaEmbedURL.description: The URL for the Q&A natural language embedded experience

webUrl.description: The web URL for accessing the dataset in the Power BI service

tables.description: The tables that make up the dataset schema

relationships.description: The relationships between tables in the dataset model

datasources.description: The data sources used by the dataset

Table.description: A table in the Power BI dataset model, containing columns, measures, and optionally rows for push datasets

name.description: The name of the table, used in DAX expressions and API references

columns.description: The columns defined in this table

rows.description: Data rows in the table (used for push datasets)

measures.description: DAX measures defined on this table

isHidden.description: Whether the table is hidden from report authors

Column.description: A column in a dataset table

name.description: The column name used in DAX expressions

dataType.description: The data type of the column values

formatString.description: A format string controlling how column values are displayed (e.g. '#,##0.00' for numbers)

sortByColumn.description: The name of another column used to sort this column's values

dataCategory.description: The data category providing semantic meaning to the column (e.g. Address, City, Country)

isHidden.description: Whether the column is hidden from report authors

summarizeBy.description: The default aggregation function for the column

Measure.description: A DAX measure defined on a dataset table

name.description: The display name of the measure

expression.description: The DAX expression that defines the measure calculation

formatString.description: A format string controlling how the measure value is displayed

description.description: A description of what the measure calculates

isHidden.description: Whether the measure is hidden from report authors

Relationship.description: A relationship between two tables in the dataset model

name.description: The unique name of the relationship

fromTable.description: The name of the source (many-side) table

fromColumn.description: The name of the column in the source table

toTable.description: The name of the target (one-side) table

toColumn.description: The name of the column in the target table

crossFilteringBehavior.description: The cross-filtering direction for the relationship

Datasource.description: A data source used by the dataset

datasourceType.description: The type of data source (e.g. Sql, AnalysisServices, File, Web)

connectionDetails.description: Connection details for the data source

url.description: The connection URL for web-based data sources

path.description: The file path for file-based data sources

datasourceId.description: The unique identifier of the bound data source

gatewayId.description: The gateway identifier if using an on-premises data gateway
